retrospective.summary: Ran the new template-backed update workflow against the local Codex host successfully. The local CLI moved from 0.1.57 to 0.1.58, the global npm install now reports @veewo/claw@0.1.58, and the Codex plugin cache now includes the 0.1.58+codex.20260710043525 install surface with the matching plugin manifest.

keyDecisions: This local refresh used the Codex host route from the update claw skill and verified both the CLI surface and the Codex plugin cache surface.
The update workflow can resume safely even when the CLI refresh was started just before switching back into the template-backed claw skill flow.
